title: "OncoAgent: A Dual-Tier Multi-Agent Framework for Privacy-Preserving Oncology Clinical Decision Support"
summary: This paper introduces OncoAgent, a dual-tier multi-agent framework designed for oncology clinical decision support. It addresses privacy concerns by implementing a local-first architecture where sensitive patient data is processed on-premises, while a cloud-based tier handles non-sensitive tasks like literature retrieval. The system integrates LLM agents for reasoning, RAG for evidence-based recommendations, and fine-tuned models for domain-specific tasks.
